annual_rate.notes: General rate under CPLR 5004(a): 9% per annum "except where otherwise provided by statute". Treated as simple interest in NY practice. For judgments arising out of CONSUMER DEBT against a natural person the rate is 2% (see the companion consumer-debt series). Effective date shown is when the current statutory scheme took effect (L.2021 ch.831, eff. Apr 30, 2022); the 9% general rate long predates it. Verify against the statute; not legal advice.
